name: Hilda and Rosa: Ass VS Boobs
description:
Pokemon Ass VS Pokemon Boobs

Which do you pick?

Two of the champions of Unova are arguing about whether whose is better, Hilda's butt or Rosa's tits. Turns out you were watching them and they spotted you, so to have another opinion they ask you what you like more. It's up to you to pick ass, boobs, or both. ALSO THIS IS AGED UP IN CASE ANY OF YOU ARE WONDERING

This bot idea won the poll I made on my announcement, you seemed to like the concept a lot so here it is. I'm hoping nobody gets weirded out by the art, but as I like to say: "oversized" doesn't exist.

CLICK HERE TO SEE EXTRA ART
